text:
was the name given by Hange Zoë to a Titan which was captured after the reconquest of Trost District.

Appearance

Pure Titan form

Bean was a Titan that stood 7 meters high and had short messy brown hair and brown eyes. Bean also had light peachy-colored skin like the other normal Titans.

Abilities

Bean displayed typical traits for a Titan of its class. It acted with little intelligence, and responded to an attempt of communication by attempting to eat Hange. It appeared to have a sense of pain, since it reacted when its eye was gouged out by a spear. It exhibited a loss of activity after three hours of sunlight deprivation.

Story

Wall Sealing arc

Bean first appears when the gate of Trost District is broken by the Colossus Titan and numerous Titans invade the district. However, once the breach is plugged by Eren Yeager, human forces are able to retake the district. Most of the Titans who had entered are killed, but two are taken alive; Hange Zoë nicknames them "Sonny" and "Bean."

The Female Titan arc

They perform a number of experiments on Sonny and Bean, including: testing their response to attempts at communication, injury, and sunlight deprivation. They have further tests planned; however, during the night, both test subjects are killed by unknown assailants. Armin Arlert later comes to the conclusion that this was the doing of Annie Leonhart, as he believes that she used Marco Bott's vertical maneuvering equipment to escape suspicion during the investigation of the Titans' murder.

Legacy

Marley arc

In the year 854, Reiner Braun the lone Warrior to return back to their hometown, remembers how it was his idea for him and Annie to kill the captured Titans. 

People killed

Failed attempts

Hange Zoë

Trivia

Bean ranked thirty-eighth in the Second Character Popularity Poll.
Hange's nicknames for the two Titans, Sonny and Bean, are direct references to the famous cannibal of the same name, . However, the former uses an anglicized version of the name.
